charity.s: Via parent company Nike: $220M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.42% of revenue) via Nike Foundation. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #41 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Drucker Institute Management Top 250 — ranked #21 (2024) on customer satisfaction, employee engagement, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength. Fortune World's Most Admired Companies — ranked #15 (2024). Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America — ranked #31 (2024). Operates the Nike Foundation: $21.3M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).

environment.s: Via parent company Nike: CDP Climate Change: A- (2024) — leadership-band environmental disclosure with validated targets.

dei.s: Via parent company Nike: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #41 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Via parent company Nike: Salmon-Safe certified at world HQ (Beaverton, OR). [Salmon-Safe]

privacy.s: Via parent company Nike: Terms-of-service privacy grade D (poor) via ToS;DR (tosdr.org), CC BY-SA 3.0 — transformed to TruNorth's scale.

execPay.s: Via parent company Nike: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 545:1 (median employee pay $48,723) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2025).

wiki.extract: Nike By You is a service provided by Nike allowing customers to personalize and design their own Nike merchandise, most specifically footwear but also sportswear. They offer online services as well as physical studios in different countries around the world, including: United Kingdom, Italy, France, Japan, Spain, Germany, China, USA, Canada and Australia.
